etymology.description: phonetic 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") + semantic 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") -> represents destruction or ruin
etymology.interpretation: 烕(烕) (huǐ) combines 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") which serves as a phonetic component, with 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") providing semantic meaning, reflecting a concept of destruction or something being burned. This character is less commonly used today.
